title: [CodeGen][InstCombine][Sanitizers] Emit lifetimes when compiling with memtag-stack
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/lifetime-sanitizer.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/lifetime-sanitizer.ll
index fd45fe2dd27d7..2f4e3e3528a2e 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/lifetime-sanitizer.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/lifetime-sanitizer.ll
@@ -34,6 +34,21 @@ entry:
   ret void
 }
 
+define void @memtag() sanitize_memtag {
+entry:
+  ; CHECK-LABEL: @memtag(
+  %text = alloca i8, align 1
+
+  call void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr %text)
+  call void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr %text)
+  ; CHECK: call void @llvm.lifetime.start
+  ; CHECK-NEXT: call void @llvm.lifetime.end
+
+  call void @foo(ptr %text) ; Keep alloca alive
+
+  ret void
+}
+
 define void @msan() sanitize_memory {
 entry:
   ; CHECK-LABEL: @msan(

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr immarg) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr immarg) #0

declare void @foo(ptr nocapture)

; Function Attrs: sanitize_memtag
define void @memtag() #1 {
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr immarg) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr immarg) #0

declare void @foo(ptr nocapture)

; Function Attrs: sanitize_memtag
define void @memtag() #1 {
entry:
  %text = alloca i8, align 1
  call void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr %text)
  call void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr %text)
  call void @foo(ptr %text)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr immarg) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr immarg) #0

declare void @foo(ptr nocapture)

; Function Attrs: sanitize_memory
define void @msan() #1 {
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr immarg) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr immarg) #0

declare void @foo(ptr nocapture)

; Function Attrs: sanitize_memory
define void @msan() #1 {
entry:
  %text = alloca i8, align 1
  call void @llvm.lifetime.start.p0(ptr %text)
  call void @llvm.lifetime.end.p0(ptr %text)
  call void @foo(ptr %text)
  ret void
}
